# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  BUILD_SCRIPT: "./scripts/build.sh"
  TEST_SCRIPT: "./scripts/test.sh"
  DEPLOY_SCRIPT: "./scripts/deploy.sh"
  BUILD_IMAGE: "ubuntu:latest"
  CUSTOM_ENV_FILE: ".env.ci"

default:
  tags:
    - shared
  before_script:
    - |
      if [ -f "$CUSTOM_ENV_FILE" ]; then
        echo "Loading custom environment variables from $CUSTOM_ENV_FILE"
        export $(grep -v '^#' "$CUSTOM_ENV_FILE" | xargs)
      fi
    - |
      if [ -f "./scripts/setup.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom setup script"
        chmod +x ./scripts/setup.sh
        ./scripts/setup.sh
      fi

build:
  stage: build
  image: $BUILD_IMAGE
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "$BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom build script: $BUILD_SCRIPT"
        chmod +x "$BUILD_SCRIPT"
        $BUILD_SCRIPT
      else
        echo "No custom build script found at $BUILD_SCRIPT"
        echo "Checking for common build configurations..."
        if [ -f "Makefile" ]; then
          echo "Makefile detected, running make"
          make build
        elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
          echo "package.json detected, running npm build"
          npm install
          npm run build
        elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
          echo "pom.xml detected, running Maven build"
          mvn clean package -B
        elif [ -f "build.gradle" ] || [ -f "build.gradle.kts" ]; then
          echo "Gradle build file detected, running Gradle build"
          ./gradlew build
        elif [ -f "requirements.txt" ] || [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
          echo "Python project detected, running pip install"
          pip install -r requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || pip install . 2>/dev/null || echo "Python setup complete"
        elif [ -f "Cargo.toml" ]; then
          echo "Rust project detected, running cargo build"
          cargo build --release
        elif [ -f "go.mod" ]; then
          echo "Go project detected, running go build"
          go build ./...
        else
          echo "No recognized build system found. Please provide a custom build script at $BUILD_SCRIPT"
          exit 1
        fi
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
      - dist/
      - target/
      - out/
      - bin/
      - node_modules/
    expire_in: 1 week
    when: on_success
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG
    - if: $FORCE_BUILD == "true"

test:
  stage: test
  image: $BUILD_IMAGE
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "$TEST_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom test script: $TEST_SCRIPT"
        chmod +x "$TEST_SCRIPT"
        $TEST_SCRIPT
      else
        echo "No custom test script found at $TEST_SCRIPT"
        echo "Checking for common test configurations..."
        if [ -f "Makefile" ] && grep -q "test" Makefile; then
          echo "Makefile test target detected"
          make test
        elif [ -f "package.json" ]; then
          echo "package.json detected, running npm test"
          npm test
        elif [ -f "pom.xml" ]; then
          echo "pom.xml detected, running Maven tests"
          mvn test -B
        elif [ -f "build.gradle" ] || [ -f "build.gradle.kts" ]; then
          echo "Gradle build file detected, running Gradle tests"
          ./gradlew test
        elif [ -f "requirements.txt" ] || [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
          echo "Python project detected, running pytest"
          pytest || python -m unittest discover || echo "No tests found"
        elif [ -f "Cargo.toml" ]; then
          echo "Rust project detected, running cargo test"
          cargo test
        elif [ -f "go.mod" ]; then
          echo "Go project detected, running go test"
          go test ./...
        else
          echo "No recognized test framework found. Skipping tests."
          echo "Provide a custom test script at $TEST_SCRIPT for custom test execution."
        fi
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - test-results/
      - coverage/
      - htmlcov/
    reports:
      junit:
        - test-results/**/*.xml
        - "**/TEST-*.xml"
        - "**/surefire-reports/*.xml"
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: coverage/cobertura-coverage.xml
    when: always
    expire_in: 30 days
  coverage: '/(?:total|Total|TOTAL).*?(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*%/'
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG
    - if: $FORCE_TEST == "true"
  allow_failure: false

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  image: $BUILD_IMAGE
  dependencies:
    - build
    - test
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom deploy script: $DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        chmod +x "$DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        $DEPLOY_SCRIPT
      else
        echo "No custom deploy script found at $DEPLOY_SCRIPT"
        echo "Please provide a deploy script at $DEPLOY_SCRIPT to enable deployment."
        exit 1
      fi
  environment:
    name: $DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT
    url: $DEPLOY_URL
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH && $DEPLOY_ENABLED == "true"
      when: manual
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG && $DEPLOY_ENABLED == "true"
      when: manual
  allow_failure: false

# Optional: Lint stage that teams can enable via variable
lint:
  stage: build
  image: $BUILD_IMAGE
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "./scripts/lint.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom lint script"
        chmod +x ./scripts/lint.sh
        ./scripts/lint.sh
      else
        echo "No lint script found at ./scripts/lint.sh. Skipping."
      fi
  rules:
    - if: $LINT_ENABLED == "true" && $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $LINT_ENABLED == "true" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  allow_failure: true

# Optional: Security scanning stage
security_scan:
  stage: test
  image: $BUILD_IMAGE
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "./scripts/security_scan.sh" ]; then
        echo "Executing custom security scan script"
        chmod +x ./scripts/security_scan.sh
        ./scripts/security_scan.sh
      else
        echo "No security scan script found at ./scripts/security_scan.sh. Skipping."
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - security-reports/
    expire_in: 90 days
  rules:
    - if: $SECURITY_SCAN_ENABLED == "true" && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
    - if: $SECURITY_SCAN_ENABLED == "true" && $CI_COMMIT_TAG
  allow_failure: true
